Breast - right Mammogram magnification and spot
Breast - left Mammogram magnification and spot
Breast - bilateral Mammogram Post Wire Placement
Breast - left Mammogram Post Wire Placement

Demographics.Value: Genderqueer, neither exclusively male nor female
Additional gender category or other, please specify

HospitalizationHistory.Field_Name: Discharged to home or self care (routine discharge)
Discharged/transferred to another short term general hospital for inpatient care
Discharged/transferred to an intermediate care facility (ICF)
Discharged/transferred to another type of institution for inpatient care or referred for outpatient services to another institution
Discharged/transferred to home under care of organized home health service organization
Left against medical advice or discontinued care
Discharged/transferred to home under care of Home IV provider
Admitted as an inpatient to this hospital
Discharge to be defined at state level, if necessary
Expired to be defined at state level, if necessary
Still patient or expected to return for outpatient services (i.e. still a patient)
Still patient to be defined at state level, if necessary (i.e. still a patient)
Expired (i.e. died) in a medical facility; e.g., hospital, SNF, ICF, or free standing hospice

RxHistory.value: every three to four hours while awake
every four to six hours while awake

StaticLookUp.Description: Physician, team member service

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Alternate payment method declined by provider of service

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Determination of refractive state was not performed in the course of diagnostic ophthalmological examination

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Physician providing a service in an unlisted health professional shortage area (hpsa)

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Physician provider services in a physician scarcity area

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Physician assistant, nurse practitioner, or clinical nurse specialist services for assistant at surgery

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Acute treatment (this modifier should be used when reporting service 98940, 98941, 98942)

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Item furnished in conjunction with a urological, ostomy, or tracheostomy supply

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Item furnished in conjunction with a prosthetic device, prosthetic or orthotic

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Item furnished in conjunction with a surgical dressing

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Item furnished in conjunction with dialysis services

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Item or service furnished to an esrd patient that is not for the treatment of esrd

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Physician providing a service in a dental health professional shortage area for the purpose of an electronic health record incentive payment

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Item furnished in conjunction with parenteral enteral nutrition (pen) services

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Special acquisition of blood and blood products

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Orally administered nutrition, not by feeding tube

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: The beneficiary has been informed of the purchase and rental options and has elected to purchase the item

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: The beneficiary has been informed of the purchase and rental options and has elected to rent the item

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: The beneficiary has been informed of the purchase and rental options and after 30 days has not informed the supplier of his/her decision

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Procedure payable only in the inpatient setting when performed emergently on an outpatient who expires prior to admission

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Service ordered by a renal dialysis facility (rdf) physician as part of the esrd beneficiary's dialysis benefit, is not part of the composite rate, and is separately reimbursable

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Procedure code change (use 'cc' when the procedure code submitted was changed either for administrative reasons or because an incorrect code was filed)

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Amcc test has been ordered by an esrd facility or mcp physician that is part of the composite rate and is not separately billable

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Amcc test has been ordered by an esrd facility or mcp physician that is a composite rate test but is beyond the normal frequency covered under the rate and is separately reimbursable based on medical necessity

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Amcc test has been ordered by an esrd facility or mcp physician that is not part of the composite rate and is separately billable

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Policy criteria applied

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: 0 percent impaired, limited or restricted

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: At least 1 percent but less than 20 percent impaired, limited or restricted

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: At least 20 percent but less than 40 percent impaired, limited or restricted

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: At least 40 percent but less than 60 percent impaired, limited or restricted

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: At least 60 percent but less than 80 percent impaired, limited or restricted

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: At least 80 percent but less than 100 percent impaired, limited or restricted

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: 100 percent impaired, limited or restricted

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Outpatient occupational therapy services furnished in whole or in part by an occupational therapy assistant

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Adjunctive service related to a procedure assigned to a comprehensive ambulatory payment classification (c-apc) procedure, but reported on a different claim

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Outpatient physical therapy services furnished in whole or in part by a physical therapist assistant

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Catastrophe/disaster related

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Item or service related, in whole or in part, to an illness, injury, or condition that was caused by or exacerbated by the effects, direct or indirect, of the 2010 oil spill in the gulf of mexico, including but not limited to subsequent clean-up activities

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Computed tomography services furnished using equipment that does not meet each of the attributes of the national electrical manufacturers association (nema) xr-29-2013 standard

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Diagnostic or therapeutic site other than P or H when these are used as origin codes

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Oral health assessment by a licensed health professional other than a dentist

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from diagnostic or therapeutic site other than P or H to diagnostic or therapeutic site other than P or H when these are used as origin codes

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from diagnostic or therapeutic site other than P or H to residential, domicillary,or custodial facility (other than an 1819 facility)

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from diagnostic or therapeutic site other than P or H to hospital-based ESRD facility

StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from diagnostic or therapeutic site other than P or H to hospital

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from diagnostic or therapeutic site other than P or H to site of transfer (e.g. airport or helicopter pad) between modes of ambulance transport

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from diagnostic or therapeutic site other than P or H to freestanding ESRD facility

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from diagnostic or therapeutic site other than P or H to skilled nursing facility

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from diagnostic or therapeutic site other than P or H to physician's office

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from diagnostic or therapeutic site other than P or H to residence

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from diagnostic or therapeutic site other than P or H to scene of accident or acute event

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from diagnostic or therapeutic site other than P or H to intermediate stop at physician's office on way to hospital

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Residential, domiciliary, custodial facility (other than 1819 facility)

StaticLookUp.Description: Upper left, eyelid

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Lower left, eyelid

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Upper right, eyelid

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Lower right, eyelid

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Erythropoetic stimulating agent (esa) administered to treat anemia due to anti-cancer chemotherapy

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Erythropoetic stimulating agent (esa) administered to treat anemia due to anti-cancer radiotherapy

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Erythropoetic stimulating agent (esa) administered to treat anemia not due to anti-cancer radiotherapy or anti-cancer chemotherapy

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Hematocrit level has exceeded 39% (or hemoglobin level has exceeded 13.0 g/dl) for 3 or more consecutive billing cycles immediately prior to and including the current cycle

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Hematocrit level has not exceeded 39% (or hemoglobin level has not exceeded 13.0 g/dl) for 3 or more consecutive billing cycles immediately prior to and including the current cycle

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from residential, domiciliary, custodial facility (other than 1819 facility) to hospital-based dialysis facility

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from residential, domiciliary, custodial facility (other than 1819 facility) to hospital

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from residential, domiciliary, custodial facility (other than 1819 facility) to site of transfer (for example, airport or helicopter pad) between modes of ambulance transport

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Subsequent claims for a defined course of therapy, e.g., epo, sodium hyaluronate, infliximab

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Emergency reserve supply (for esrd benefit only)

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from residential, domiciliary, custodial facility (other than 1819 facility) to skilled nursing facility (SNF)

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Service provided as part of medicaid early periodic screening diagnosis and treatment (epsdt) program

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Items and services furnished by a provider-based, off-campus emergency department

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from residential, domiciliary, custodial facility (other than 1819 facility) to scene of accident or acute event

StaticLookUp.Description: No physician or other licensed health care provider order for this item or service

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Item provided without cost to provider, supplier or practitioner, or full credit received for replaced device (examples, but not limited to, covered under warranty, replaced due to defect, free samples)

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Partial credit received for replaced device

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Service provided as part of family planning program

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: X-ray taken using film

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: X-ray taken using computed radiography technology/cassette-based imaging

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Hospital-based ESRD facility

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Telehealth services for diagnosis, evaluation, or treatment, of symptoms of an acute stroke

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Most recent urr reading of less than 60

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Most recent urr reading of 60 to 64.9

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Most recent urr reading of 65 to 69.9

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Most recent urr reading of 70 to 74.9

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Most recent urr reading of 75 or greater

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Esrd patient for whom less than six dialysis sessions have been provided in a month

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Pregnancy resulted from rape or incest or pregnancy certified by physician as life threatening

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Monitored anesthesia care (mac) for deep complex, complicated, or markedly invasive surgical procedure

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Monitored anesthesia care for patient who has history of severe cardio-pulmonary condition

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Waiver of liability statement issued as required by payer policy, individual case

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Claim being re-submitted for payment because it is no longer covered under a global payment demonstration

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: This service has been performed in part by a resident under the direction of a teaching physician

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Units of service exceeds medically unlikely edit value and represents reasonable and necessary services

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: This service has been performed by a resident without the presence of a teaching physician under the primary care exception

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Non-physician (e.g. nurse practitioner (np), certified registered nurse anesthetist (crna), certified registered nurse (crn), clinical nurse specialist (cns), physician assistant (pa)) services in a critical access hospital

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Performance and payment of a screening mammogram and diagnostic mammogram on the same patient, same day

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Diagnostic mammogram converted from screening mammogram on same day

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from hospital-based ESRD facility to site of transfer (for example, airport or helicopter pad) between modes of ambulance transport

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: opt out physician or practitioner emergency or urgent service

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Reasonable and necessary item/service associated with a ga or gz modifier

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Medically unnecessary upgrade provided instead of non-upgraded item, no charge, no advance beneficiary notice (abn)

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Multiple patients on one ambulance trip

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Services delivered under an outpatient speech language pathology plan of care

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Services delivered under an outpatient occupational therapy plan of care

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: This service was performed in whole or in part by a resident in a department of veterans affairs medical center or clinic, supervised in accordance with va policy

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Dosage of erythropoietin stimulating agent has been reduced and maintained in response to hematocrit or hemoglobin level

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Via interactive audio and video telecommunications systems

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Waiver of liability statement issued as required by payer policy, routine notice

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Attending physician not employed or paid under arrangement by the patient's hospice provider

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Service not related to the hospice patient's terminal condition

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Notice of liability issued, voluntary under payer policy

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Item or service statutorily excluded, does not meet the definition of any medicare benefit or, for non-medicare insurers, is not a contract benefit

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Item or service expected to be denied as not reasonable and necessary

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Site of transfer (e.g. airport or helicopter pad) between modes of ambulance transport

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from site of transfer (for example, airport or helicopter pad) between modes of ambulance transport to diagnostic or therapeutic site other than P or H when these are used as origin codes

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from site of transfer (for example, airport or helicopter pad) between different modes of ambulance transport to residential, domiciliary, custodial facility (other than 1819 facility)

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from freestanding ESRD facility to scene of accident or acute event

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Drug amount discarded/not administered to any patient

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from freestanding ESRD facility to intermediate stop at physician's office on way to hospital

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Lower extremity prosthesis functional level 0 - does not have the ability or potential to ambulate or transfer safely with or without assistance and a prosthesis does not enhance their quality of life or mobility.

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Lower extremity prosthesis functional level 1 - has the ability or potential to use a prosthesis for transfers or ambulation on level surfaces at fixed cadence. typical of the limited and unlimited household ambulator.

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Lower extremity prosthesis functional level 2 - has the ability or potential for ambulation with the ability to traverse low level environmental barriers such as curbs, stairs or uneven surfaces. typical of the limited community ambulator.

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Lower extremity prosthesis functional level 3 - has the ability or potential for ambulation with variable cadence. typical of the community ambulator who has the ability to transverse most environmental barriers and may have vocational, therapeutic, or exercise activity that demands prosthetic utilization beyond simple locomotion.

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Lower extremity prosthesis functional level 4 - has the ability or potential for prosthetic ambulation that exceeds the basic ambulation skills, exhibiting high impact, stress, or energy levels, typical of the prosthetic demands of the child, active adult, or athlete.

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Add on option/accessory for wheelchair

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Beneficiary requested upgrade for abn, more than 4 modifiers identified on claim

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Replacement of special power wheelchair interface

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Drug or biological infused through dme

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Bid under round one of the dmepos competitive bidding program for use with non-competitive bid base equipment

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Item designated by fda as class iii device

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Dmepos item subject to dmepos competitive bidding program number 1

StaticLookUp.Description: Dmepos item, initial claim, purchase or first month rental

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Replacement of facial prosthesis using previous master model

StaticLookUp.Description: Single drug unit dose formulation

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: First drug of a multiple drug unit dose formulation

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Second or subsequent drug of a multiple drug unit dose formulation

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Rental item, billing for partial month

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Glucose monitor supply for diabetic beneficiary not treated with insulin

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Beneficiary resides in a competitive bidding area and travels outside that competitive bidding area and receives a competitive bid item

StaticLookUp.Description: Requirements specified in the medical policy have been met

StaticLookUp.Description: New coverage not implemented by managed care

StaticLookUp.Description: Provider attestation that the hospital laboratory test(s) is not packaged under the hospital opps

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER

StaticLookUp.Description: Laboratory round trip

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Medicare secondary payer (msp)

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ordering professional is not required to consult a Clinical Decision Support Mechanism due to service being rendered to a patient with a suspected or confirmed emergency medical condition

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ordering professional is not required to consult a Clinical Decision Support Mechanism due to the significant hardship exception of insufficient internet access

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ordering professional is not required to consult a Clinical Decision Support Mechanism due to the significant hardship exception of electronic health record or Clinical Decision Support Mechanism vendor issues

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ordering professional is not required to consult a Clinical Decision Support Mechanism due to the significant hardship exception of extreme and uncontrollable circumstances

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: The order for this service adheres to Appropriate Use Criteria in the Clinical Decision Support Mechanism consulted by the ordering professional

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: The order for this service does not adhere to the Appropriate Use Criteria in the Clinical Decision Support Mechanism consulted by the ordering professional

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: The order for this service does not have applicable Appropriate Use Criteria in the qualified Clinical Decision Support Mechanism consulted by the ordering professional

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Unknown if ordering professional consulted a Clinical Decision Support Mechanism for this service, related information was not provided to the furnishing professional or provider

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Six month maintenance and servicing fee for reasonable and necessary parts and labor which are not covered under any manufacturer or supplier warranty

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Nebulizer system, any type, fda-cleared for use with specific drug

StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from skilled nursing facility to physician's office

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: New when rented (use the 'nr' modifier when dme which was new at the time of rental is subsequently purchased)

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from skilled nursing facility to scene of accident or acute event

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: A normal healthy patient

StaticLookUp.Description: A patient with mild systemic disease

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: A patient with severe systemic disease

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: A patient with severe systemic disease that is a constant threat to life

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: A declared brain-dead patient whose origins are being removed for donor purposes

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Surgical or other invasive procedure on wrong body part

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Surgical or other invasive procedure on wrong patient

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Wrong surgery or other invasive procedure on patient

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Diagnostic or related non diagnostic item or service provided in a wholly owned or operated entity to a patient who is admitted as an inpatient within 3 days

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from physician's office to residential, domiciliary, custodial facility (other than 1819 facility)

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from physician's office to hospital-based ESRD facility

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from physician's office to hospital

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Positron emission tomography (pet) or pet/computed tomography (ct) to inform the initial treatment strategy of tumors that are biopsy proven or strongly suspected of being cancerous based on other diagnostic testing

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from physician's office to freestanding ESRD facility

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Progressive addition lenses

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Post mortem

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Non-excepted service provided at an off-campus, outpatient, provider-based department of a hospital

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Excepted service provided at an off-campus, outpatient, provider-based department of a hospital

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from physician's office to physician's office

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from physician's office to residence

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Positron emission tomography (pet) or pet/computed tomography (ct) to inform the subsequent treatment strategy of cancerous tumors when the beneficiary's treating physician determines that the pet study is needed to inform subsequent anti-tumor strategy

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Colorectal cancer screening test; converted to diagnostic test or other procedure

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from physician's office to intermediate stop at physician's office on way to hospital

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Investigational clinical service provided in a clinical research study that is in an approved clinical research study

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Routine clinical service provided in a clinical research study that is in an approved clinical research study

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Demonstration procedure/service

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Live kidney donor surgery and related services

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Service for ordering/referring physician qualifies as a service exemption

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Service furnished by a substitute physician under a reciprocal billing arrangement

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Service furnished by a locum tenens physician

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: One class a finding

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Two class b findings

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: One class b and two class c findings

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Prescribed amounts of stationary oxygen for daytime use while at rest and nighttime use differ and the average of the two amounts is less than 1 liter per minute (LPM)

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Prescribed amounts of stationary oxygen for daytime use while at rest and nighttime use differ and the average of the two amounts exceeds 4 liters per minute (LPM) and portable oxygen is prescribed

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Single channel monitoring

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Recording and storage in solid state memory by a digital recorder

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Prescribed amount of oxygen is less than 1 liter per minute (lpm)

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Prescribed amount of oxygen exceeds 4 liters per minute (lpm) and portable oxygen is prescribed

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Prescribed amount of oxygen is greater than 4 liters per minute(lpm)

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Oxygen conserving device is being used with an oxygen delivery system

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Services/items provided to a prisoner or patient in state or local custody, however the state or local government, as applicable, meets the requirements in 42 cfr 411.4 (b)

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Medical direction of two, three, or four concurrent anesthesia procedures involving qualified individuals

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Patient pronounced dead after ambulance called

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance service provided under arrangement by a provider of services

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance service furnished directly by a provider of services

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Documentation is on file showing that the laboratory test(s) was ordered individually or ordered as a cpt-recognized panel other than automated profile codes 80002-80019, g0058, g0059, and g0060.

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ordering professional consulted a qualified clinical decision support mechanism for this service and the related data was provided to the furnishing professional

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Prescribed amounts of stationary oxygen for daytime use while at rest and nighttime use differ and the average of the two amounts is greater than 4 liters per minute (LPM)

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Monitored anesthesia care service

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Recording and storage on tape by an analog tape recorder

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Clia waived test

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Crna service: with medical direction by a physician

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Medical direction of one certified registered nurse anesthetist (crna) by an anesthesiologist

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Crna service: without medical direction by a physician

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Replacement of a dme, orthotic or prosthetic item

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Replacement of a part of a dme, orthotic or prosthetic item furnished as part of a repair

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Right coronary artery (hospital use with codes 92980-92984, 92995, 92996

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Drug provided to beneficiary, but not administered incident-to

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Furnished in full compliance with fda-mandated risk evaluation and mitigation strategy (rems)

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulance transportation from residence to hospital-based ESRD facility

StaticLookUp.Description: Services provided by registered nurse with specialized, highly technical home infusion training

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: State and/or federally-funded programs/services

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Second opinion ordered by a professional review organization (pro) per section 9401, p.l. 99-272 (100% reimbursement - no medicare deductible or coinsurance)

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Ambulatory surgical center (asc) facility service

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Second concurrently administered infusion therapy

StaticLookUp.Description: Third or more concurrently administered infusion therapy

StaticLookUp.Description: Member of high risk population (use only with codes for immunization)

StaticLookUp.Description: Home infusion services provided in the infusion suite of the iv therapy provider

StaticLookUp.Description: Related to trauma or injury

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Procedure performed in physician's office (to denote use of facility and equipment)

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Pharmaceuticals delivered to patient's home but not utilized

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Medicare Diabetes Prevention Program (MDPP) virtual make-up session

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Aphakic patient

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Intermediate stop at physician's office on way to hospital (destination code only)

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Continuous/broad services: for reporting services by clinicians, who provide the principal care for a patient, with no planned endpoint of the relationship; services in this category represent comprehensive care, dealing with the entire scope of patient problems, either directly or in a care coordination role; reporting clinician service examples include, but are not limited to, primary care, and clinicians providing comprehensive care to patients in addition to specialty care

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Continuous/focused services: for reporting services by clinicians whose expertise is needed for the ongoing management of a chronic disease or a condition that needs to be managed and followed with no planned endpoint to the relationship; reporting clinician service examples include, but are not limited to, a rheumatologist taking care of the patient's rheumatoid arthritis longitudinally but not providing general primary care services

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Episodic/broad services: for reporting services by clinicians who have broad responsibility for the comprehensive needs of the patient that is limited to a defined period and circumstance such as a hospitalization; reporting clinician service examples include, but are not limited to, the hospitalist's services rendered providing comprehensive and general care to a patient while admitted to the hospital

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Episodic/focused services: for reporting services by clinicians who provide focused care on particular types of treatment limited to a defined period and circumstance; the patient has a problem, acute or chronic, that will be treated with surgery, radiation, or some other type of generally time-limited intervention; reporting clinician service examples include, but are not limited to, the orthopedic surgeon performing a knee replacement and seeing the patient through the postoperative period

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Diagnostic services requested by another clinician: for reporting services by a clinician who furnishes care to the patient only as requested by another clinician or subsequent and related services requested by another clinician; this modifier is reported for patient relationships that may not be adequately captured by the above alternative categories; reporting clinician service examples include, but are not limited to, the radiologist's interpretation of an imaging study requested by another clinician

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Custom Modifier Provider by ProMed

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Separate encounter, a service that is distinct because it occurred during a separate encounter

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Separate practitioner, a service that is distinct because it was performed by a different practitioner

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Separate structure, a service that is distinct because it was performed on a separate organ/structure

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Unusual non-overlapping service, the use of a service that is distinct because it does not overlap usual components of the main service

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: Merck/Samsung Bioepis

StaticLookUp.Name: MODIFIER
StaticLookUp.Description: PROFESSIONAL AND TECHNICAL COMPONENT

Specialty.Value: Psychiatry & Neurology Neurology with Special Qualifications in Child Neurology
